summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fun Roulette LIVE game feature with universal time synchronization. All backend APIs working correctly with proper phase management (BETTING→SPINNING→RESULT), universal sync verified between player and admin, betting/clearing/settlement mechanics functioning as expected. Frontend UI fully functional with European wheel, green felt board, chip selection, and real-time phase transitions. Regression test passed - Seven-Up-Down still works.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/games/fun-roulette/state returns round_number, phase, countdown, my_bets, last_results, balance
Backend: Universal sync verified - player and admin see identical round_number and winning_number
Backend: Phase progression BETTING(17s) → SPINNING(5s) → RESULT(3s) → next round increments
Backend: POST /api/games/fun-roulette/bets during BETTING phase places bet and debits balance
Backend: Stacking multiple bets works correctly (color + straight number)
Backend: POST /api/games/fun-roulette/bets/clear refunds all bets and restores balance
Backend: Bet below minimum (< 10 chips) returns 400
Backend: Settlement appears after round completes with correct winning_number, total_bet, payout
Backend: Balance credited correctly on win (color bet 100 chips won 200 payout = 2x multiplier)
Backend: POST bets during SPINNING/RESULT phase returns 409 BETS_CLOSED
Backend: Old generic POST /api/games/fun-roulette/play returns 409 LIVE_ROUNDS
Backend: GET /api/games/fun-roulette/history returns settled rounds with outcome structure
Frontend: Login and navigation to /games/fun-roulette/play successful
Frontend: Phase bar (data-testid roulette-phase) shows PLACE YOUR BETS / NO MORE BETS / RESULT
Frontend: Timer (data-testid roulette-timer) counts down each second
Frontend: European wheel (data-testid roulette-wheel) renders with correct SVG
Frontend: Green felt board (data-testid roulette-board) with 0 cell + 36 numbered cells + outside bets
Frontend: Chip tray with all 5 chips (10, 50, 100, 500, 1000) - all clickable
Frontend: Betting cells for straight numbers, RED, BLACK, EVEN, ODD, 1-18, 19-36, dozens, columns all present
Frontend: Chip selection working - click chip 100, then click RED cell
Frontend: My total (data-testid roulette-my-total) updates to 100 after placing bet
Frontend: Balance (data-testid play-balance) updates after bet placement
Frontend: Clear bets button (data-testid roulette-clear-bets) refunds chips and shows toast notification
Frontend: My total resets to 0 after clearing bets
Frontend: Last results strip (data-testid roulette-last-results) shows colored number dots
Frontend: Rebet button (data-testid roulette-rebet-button) present
Regression: Seven-Up-Down game loads at /games/seven-up-down/play
Regression: Seven-Up-Down side selection buttons (Up, Down, Seven) present and clickable
